login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Natural Language Programming Problems for the Age of GenAI

email.label: Email Address
email.hint: Use your work or personal email

password.label: Password
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

login.redirectHint: Having trouble? Redirect mode works better with slow connections or strict network policies.

errors.emailInUse: This email is already in use. Please try another one.
errors.weakPassword: The password is too weak. Please use a stronger password.
errors.internalError: An internal error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests to login. Please try again later.
errors.missingFields: Please enter an email and password.
errors.cookiesBlocked: Your browser is blocking authentication cookies. Please use "Redirect Mode" below or adjust your privacy settings.
errors.popupTimeout: Connection is slow. Please try "Use Redirect Mode" below.
errors.popupBlocked: Popup was blocked. Please allow popups or use "Redirect Mode" below.
errors.networkError: Network connection issue detected. Please try "Use Redirect Mode" below.
errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.noGoogleAuthDebug: Google authentication is not available in debug mode.
errors.registrationFailed: Registration failed. Unable to register the new user.
errors.googleLoginFailed: Google login failed. Please try again or use redirect mode.

account.title: Account Settings
account.languageDescription: Select your preferred language for the interface and AI feedback
account.themeDescription: Choose how Purplex looks to you

consent.title: Data Processing Consent
consent.description: Please review and accept the following to continue. Items marked with * are required.
consent.privacyPolicy: I have read and agree to the
consent.optionalHeader: Optional data processing (you can change these later in Settings)
consent.aiProcessing: Allow AI analysis of my code submissions
consent.aiProcessingDetail: Your code may be sent to OpenAI for comprehension analysis and feedback generation.
consent.researchUse: Allow anonymized use of my data for research
consent.researchUseDetail: De-identified submission and progress data may be used for educational research.
consent.behavioralTrackingDetail: Track detailed metrics like time spent, hint usage, and completion patterns.
consent.consentRequired: You must accept the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service to continue.

ageGate.title: Age Verification
ageGate.description: We need to verify your age to comply with data protection regulations. This information is used to determine applicable privacy protections.
ageGate.childMessage: Users under 13 require parental or guardian consent (COPPA). A parent or guardian must approve your account.
ageGate.minorMessage: Users under 18 have additional privacy protections. Some features may require parental consent.
ageGate.errorRequired: Please enter your date of birth.

coppa.title: Parental Consent Required
coppa.message: Users under 13 require verifiable parental or guardian consent before creating an account (COPPA). Please ask a parent or guardian to create an account on your behalf.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data Settings
privacy.consentDescription: Manage your data processing preferences. Required consents cannot be withdrawn without deleting your account.
privacy.directoryDescription: Control whether your name and email are visible to instructors in course rosters.
privacy.directoryToggle: Show my name and email in course rosters

aiConsentPrompt.title: Enable AI features?
aiConsentPrompt.body: This activity uses AI to analyze your code and generate feedback. Your submission will be sent to our AI provider for processing. You can change this preference anytime in Privacy settings.
aiConsentPrompt.error: We couldn't enable AI features. Please try again.

deletion.title: Delete Account
deletion.description: Requesting account deletion will deactivate your account immediately. After a 30-day grace period, all your data will be permanently deleted. During the grace period, you can cancel the deletion by logging in.
deletion.retentionNote: Note: Anonymized submission data may be retained for research purposes (scores, code, timestamps) but will no longer be linked to your identity.
deletion.confirmCheckbox: I understand this action cannot be undone after the grace period.
deletion.scheduledMessage: Your account will be permanently deleted on
deletion.scheduledCancel: You can cancel this request before then.
deletion.successCancelled: Deletion cancelled. Your account is active again.
deletion.errorRequest: Failed to request deletion. Please try again later.
deletion.errorCancel: Failed to cancel deletion. Please try again.

dataExport.title: Export Your Data
dataExport.description: Download a copy of all your personal data in JSON format. This includes your profile, submissions, progress, and consent history.
dataExport.error: Failed to export data. Please try again later.

cookie.message: We use essential cookies for site functionality. Optional cookies help us improve the experience.

section1.title: 1. Who We Are
section1.content: Purplex is an educational coding challenge platform. We act as a data controller for direct student signups and as a data processor for institutional deployments.

items.identityData: Identity Data: email, username, name (from registration or Google OAuth)
items.submissionData: Submission Data: code you write, plain-language explanations
items.progressData: Progress Data: scores, attempts, time spent, hints used
items.aiAnalysisData: AI Analysis Data: comprehension analysis of your submissions (with your consent)
items.technicalData: Technical Data: IP addresses, browser type (from server logs)

items.trackProgress: Track your progress and provide feedback
items.improvePlatform: Improve the platform through anonymized research (with consent)

section4.title: 4. Third-Party Data Processors
section4.intro: With your consent, we share data with:

items.firebase: Firebase (Google): Authentication services — your email and display name
items.openai: OpenAI: Your code submissions and explanations for AI analysis

section4.transfers: These processors are based in the United States. Data transfers are governed by Standard Contractual Clauses and Data Processing Agreements.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.intro: Under GDPR, CCPA, and DPDPA, you have the right to:

items.portability: Portability: Export your data in JSON format
items.object: Object: Withdraw consent for AI processing at any time
items.restrictProcessing: Restrict Processing: Opt out of behavioral tracking

items.submissions: Submissions: retained for 3 years after course completion
items.inactiveAccounts: Inactive accounts: warning at 12 months, deletion at 24 months

section7.title: 7. Children's Privacy
section7.content: Users under 13 (COPPA) require verifiable parental consent. Users under 18 in India (DPDPA) have additional protections including restrictions on behavioral tracking and AI profiling.

section8.title: 8. Do Not Sell or Share
section8.content: We do not sell your personal information. When we share data with AI providers (OpenAI), this is for service functionality only and requires your explicit consent.

section9.title: 9. Cookies
section9.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. Optional analytics cookies are only set with your consent.

section10.title: 10. Contact & Grievance Officer
section10.content: For privacy inquiries or to exercise your rights, contact our Data Protection Officer / Grievance Officer at the contact information provided in your institutional agreement or platform settings.

section11.title: 11. Changes to This Policy
section11.content: We will notify you of material changes and may request re-consent for significant updates to data processing practices.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By creating an account on Purplex, you agree to these Terms of Service and our {privacyPolicyLink}.

section2.title: 2. Service Description
section2.content: Purplex is an educational platform for practicing coding challenges. The platform includes AI-powered features that analyze code submissions for comprehension assessment.

section3.title: 3. AI Processing Disclosure
section3.intro: With your consent, code you submit may be sent to third-party AI services (including OpenAI) for analysis. This processing includes:

items.codeVariations: Generating code variations from natural language descriptions
items.comprehensionAnalysis: Analyzing comprehension levels through segmentation analysis

section3.optOut: You can opt out of AI processing at any time in your Privacy Settings. Core platform functionality (submitting code, viewing results) remains available without AI processing.

section4.title: 4. Age Restrictions
section4.content: Users under 13 years of age require verifiable parental consent before using this platform. Users under 18 in certain jurisdictions may have additional restrictions on data processing.

items.maliciousCode: Submit malicious code designed to exploit the execution environment
items.accessOthersData: Attempt to access other users' data
items.unrelatedUse: Use the platform for purposes unrelated to educational coding practice
items.shareCredentials: Share your account credentials with others

section6.title: 6. Intellectual Property
section6.content: Code you submit remains your intellectual property. By submitting code, you grant Purplex a license to process it for the purposes of grading, feedback, and (with your consent) research.

section7.title: 7. Account Termination
section7.content: You may delete your account at any time through Privacy Settings. We may suspend accounts that violate these terms. See our Privacy Policy for data retention details upon account deletion.

section8.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
section8.content: Purplex is provided "as is" for educational purposes. We are not liable for any loss of data, grades, or academic consequences arising from platform use or unavailability.

section9.title: 9. FERPA Notice
section9.content: For institutional deployments, Purplex operates as a "school official" with a legitimate educational interest under FERPA. Students have the right to inspect their educational records and request corrections. Contact your institution's registrar for FERPA-related requests.

section10.title: 10. Changes to Terms
section10.content: We may update these terms with notice. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance. Material changes may require re-consent.
